name: Advanex Inc.
summary: Advanex Inc., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells precision springs in Japan and internationally. The company offers wire springs, including precision springs, micro springs, and wire inserts; flat springs, such as precision presses, multi formings, molding presses, and insert collars; and insert moldings. It also provides component parts comprising torque limiters and spring clutches, and other assemblies. In addition, the company designs and manufactures tools and die sets for precision deep drawing products. Further, it manufactures and sells precision deep drawing and metal stamping products; and motors. The company was formerly known as Kato Spring Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Advanex Inc. in July 2001. Advanex Inc. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
